summary: Completed frontend testing of KonektSeries feature implementation. All 7 features tested and working correctly.

test_results.konektseries_products_with_exclusive_bad: PASS - KonektSeries products display with 'Exclusive' badge on products page
test_results.konektseries_filter_button: PASS - KonektSeries filter button shows correctly with star icon, filters to 4 products
test_results.konektseries_product_navigation: PASS - Clicking KonektSeries product navigates to /product/:id (not /customize/:id)
test_results.product_detail_page: PASS - ProductDetail page displays correctly with color/size/quantity selectors, price, stock info
test_results.add_to_cart_functionality: PASS - Add to Cart works for KonektSeries products, shows toast notification, updates cart badge
test_results.regular_product_navigation: PASS - Regular customizable products still navigate to /customize/:id
test_results.admin_konektseries_category: PASS - Admin can see KonektSeries category option in Add Product dropdown

features_verified: KonektSeries products appear in catalog with 'Exclusive' badge
KonektSeries filter button shows correctly on products page
ProductDetail page displays correctly with color/size/quantity selectors
Add to Cart works for KonektSeries products
Regular customizable products still go to /customize/:id
Admin can see KonektSeries category option when adding products
seed_data_creation: KonektSeries products already seeded: Classic Cap, Snapback Hat, Urban Shorts, Premium Bucket Hat
context_for_next_testing_agent: KonektSeries feature fully implemented and tested. Products with is_customizable=false go to /product/:id (ProductDetail page) instead of /customize/:id. The ProductDetail page allows selecting color, size, quantity and adding directly to cart without customization. Cart shows 'Pre-designed' as print method for KonektSeries items.
